entity.label: Rakkon
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A place upon the shore, a town belonging to Dan (Josh. 19:46). It is now Tell er-Rakkeit, 6 miles north of Joppa, on the sea-shore, near the mouth of the river ‘Aujeh, i.e., “yellow water.”

nodes.label: Rakkon
nodes.description: A place upon the shore, a town belonging to Dan (Josh. 19:46). It is now Tell er-Rakkeit, 6 miles north of Joppa, on the sea-shore, near the mouth of the river ‘Aujeh, i.e., “yellow water.”

verses.text: And Mejarkon, and Rakkon, with the border before Japho.
